case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS GERMAN, PAMELA A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $205.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT GERMAN, PAMELA A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GERMAN, PAMELA A.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-09-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-24-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-24-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-26-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-26-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-28-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-06-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-08-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GERMAN, PAMELA A. $205.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $230.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GERMAN, PAMELA A.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-28-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-06-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
